overall.description: First-person exploration of a sleek, futuristic corporate lobby in Cyberpunk 2077 (Arasaka building). The camera moves continuously from an entrance stairwell with red carpet, past a marble reception desk, through a dimly lit lobby with large city views, and toward a frosted glass elevator. The environment features dark polished surfaces, corporate branding, and dramatic accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate entrance stairwell with red carpet

events.description: ascending stairs and entering the main lobby area from the entrance vestibule

agents.ego_description: walking up the red-carpeted stairs and entering the corporate lobby

entered.detail: red carpeted staircase with glass and metal railing
black structural pillar with illuminated gold Arasaka corporate logo
transparent glass safety railing with metallic frame
large reception counter with marble top and dark base

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the entrance of an Arasaka corporate building, moving up red-carpeted stairs. Black pillars with gold corporate logos line the left side, while a glass railing runs along the right. The camera approaches a marble reception desk visible in the distance as it enters the main lobby area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main corporate lobby with reception desk and city views

events.description: navigating around the right side of the reception desk while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking past the reception desk and crossing the open lobby toward the rear

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows revealing futuristic cityscape and natural daylight
large structural columns with red accent lighting strips

segments.scene_description: Moving through the spacious lobby, the camera passes the reception desk on the right, which recedes into the background. Large windows on the left reveal a bright exterior cityscape, contrasting with the dim interior. The polished marble floor reflects the ambient lighting as the camera navigates around structural pillars with red accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear lobby elevator bank with frosted glass doors

events.description: approaching the frosted glass elevator doors at the end of the lobby

agents.ego_description: walking toward the elevator doors while turning slightly to face the entrance

entered.detail: large frosted glass elevator doors with metal frame and backlit silhouette
warm uplighting fixtures on textured wall panels

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the rear of the lobby where frosted glass elevator doors become the focal point. The space narrows and the lighting shifts to warmer artificial sources. The camera turns slightly toward the elevator, leaving the reception area and large windows behind, focusing on the illuminated elevator entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a formal corporate entrance into a vast, dimly lit lobby that culminates at a private elevator. It begins by ascending red-carpeted stairs flanked by black pillars with gold logos and a glass railing, moving steadily toward a distant marble reception desk. As the camera enters the main lobby, the scene expands to reveal a polished marble floor and large windows on the left that contrast the dim interior with a bright exterior cityscape. The perspective then shifts past the receding reception desk and around structural pillars accented with red light, before the space narrows toward the rear of the hall. Finally, the lighting transitions to warmer artificial tones as the camera turns away from the city views to focus on the illuminated frosted glass elevator doors.
